why: Flux-family base generation should be attempted first for general photoreal bases once the lane is proven; SDXL remains required for the large SDXL LoRA/detail ecosystem.
exception_rules: Use SDXL first when required assets are SDXL/RealVisXL only.
Use Pony only when scene explicitly requires Pony-family specialty profile.
Use Z-Image when fast experimental alternative or fallback is desired.
Use SD1.5 only for legacy last-resort compatibility.
promotion_gate: Flux-first is a routing preference, not a promotion shortcut.
